ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the asset on that date */,
  "emv" REAL /* Exponential Moving Average value for the asset on that date */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the market data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time of the data record */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price considering splits and dividends */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  "technical_indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical indicator related to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_technical_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("technical_indicator_id") REFERENCES technical_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., a stock or commodity) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, commodity, forex) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the asset on the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization for stocks */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the asset */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the trader */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the trader joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who created the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price alert, volume alert) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a notification was sent for the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the session */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the session opened */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the session closed */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total value traded during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, pre-market, post-market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the market index */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous closing value */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the index value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who placed the order */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of asset being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order was executed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time the order was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., API, web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., trend, momentum) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update, warning) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, execute_trade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "permission_group" TEXT /* Group to which the permission belongs (e.g., data, trading) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
